import io
import string
import list

fn swap_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int, _ j: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    if k == i
      result = list.push(result, xs[j])
    else if k == j
      result = list.push(result, xs[i])
    else
      result = list.push(result, xs[k])
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  result
end

fn bubble_sort(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut arr = xs
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = 0
    while j < n - i - 1
      if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]
        arr = swap_at(arr, j, j + 1)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  arr
end

fn dedup_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    []
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = [xs[0]]
    mut i = 1
    while i < n
      let v = xs[i]
      let prev = result[result.len() - 1]
      if v != prev
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(val)
      result = list.push(result, val)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums1 = parse_line(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_line(line2)

  mut merged: List<Int> = nums1
  let n2 = nums2.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n2
    merged = list.push(merged, nums2[i])
    i = i + 1
  end

  let sorted = bubble_sort(merged)
  let unique = dedup_sorted(sorted)

  let m = unique.len()
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < m
    if j == 0
      output = "#{unique[j]}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{unique[j]}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
